# PantryPal Current State

Version: v0.8.0

Implemented

- Pantry inventory
- AI receipt scanning
- AI recipe generation
- Grocery list
- Pantry Score
- Staples dashboard
- Local preferred stores
- Rush City theme
- Mild recipe preferences
- Quantity tracking
- Partial consumption
- Supabase backend
- Netlify deployment

Not yet implemented

- Live grocery prices
- Weekly ads
- Price history
- Smart shopping optimizer
- Meal planner calendar
- Household accounts
- Barcode scanner
- Receipt OCR history
